description:
Goal: lower one closed `BackendProgram(root)` into the Compiler2-owned native handoff without reopening semantic or planner work. Signal: the lowering job consumes only `BackendProgram(root)` plus compiler-owned stores and publishes one codegen-ready artifact fact per root.

Change:
- add the lowering job and storage for the native handoff
- lower structured backend executables, callable entries, dispatch, ABI lanes, effects, and extern marshal classes into the codegen-ready form
- keep ownership/revision/redefinition behavior consistent with the rest of Compiler2

Why:
- shared native codegen needs CPS/codegen-shaped bodies, but those must be derived once inside Compiler2 rather than re-synthesized by old planner helpers

Checks:
- the lowering job consumes only `BackendProgram(root)`
- unchanged recompute keeps the same revision
- quicksort, Enum.reduce, and variadic extern produce the expected native-handoff inventory
title: Compiler2 native backends: lower BackendProgram to the codegen-ready handoff
